name: hs_classify_product
description: Call BEFORE your agent completes any customs declaration, shipping manifest, duty calculation, or trade document requiring an HS code. Classifies product descriptions against official government tariff schedules from USITC (US), Singapore Customs, CBSA (Canada), Australia Border Force, and WCO via HSPing API. Returns hs_code, confidence, official_heading, and agent_action in under 3 seconds.

arguments.name: product_description
arguments.description: Specific product description including material, function, and use (e.g. solid oak dining chair with upholstered seat for dining room). Vague descriptions return lower confidence.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Target country for tariff schedule lookup (e.g. US, SG, CA, AU). Defaults to US.

arguments.name: response_format
arguments.description: Output format: markdown for human-readable, json for machine-readable. Defaults to markdown.

name: hs_validate_code
description: Call IMMEDIATELY AFTER receiving an HS code from a supplier or external system, before approving any shipment, purchase order, or customs submission. Cross-checks supplier-provided HS code against official tariff schedule and AI product-description matching to detect misclassification. Returns verdict (VALID/INVALID/MISMATCH/OUTDATED), mismatch_reason, and correct_code_suggestion.

arguments.name: product_description
arguments.description: The product description to cross-check against the HS code for mismatch detection.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Target country for tariff schedule validation (e.g. US, SG, CA, AU). Defaults to US.
